scripts.test:social-pipeline: node -e "const { buildFacebookPostPayload } = require('./social-post-pipeline'); const payload = buildFacebookPostPayload({ postText: 'Test post', graphicsDir: './social-graphics/facebook' }); console.log(JSON.stringify({ mode: payload.mode, attachments: payload.attachments.length, ready: payload.metadata.readyGraphicCount }, null, 2));"
